name: InstaMed Healthcare Payment Network API
what_it_does: InstaMed healthcare payment network REST API for healthcare providers, health plans, and healthcare financial service companies to process patient payments, provider payments, and healthcare financial transactions across InstaMed's payment network — enabling automated patient payment collection (copays, deductibles, balances), provider claim payment processing, HSA/FSA payment handling, and healthcare revenue cycle automation through InstaMed's HIPAA-compliant healthcare payment network backed by JPMorgan Chase. Enables AI agents to manage patient payment for healthcare billing collection automation, handle provider payment for claim payment processing automation, access HSA/FSA payment for health account debit automation, retrieve payment status for healthcare transaction verification automation, manage refund for healthcare payment reversal automation, handle payment plan for healthcare installment billing automation, access card-on-file for recurring patient payment automation, retrieve reporting for healthcare payment reconciliation automation, manage eligibility for healthcare benefit verification automation, and integrate InstaMed with practice management systems, EHR platforms, and revenue cycle management tools for healthcare payment automation.
use_cases: Processing patient copay and balance payments at point-of-care for healthcare provider revenue cycle automation agents
Collecting patient outstanding balances through payment plans and card-on-file for medical billing automation agents
Processing HSA/FSA debit card payments for healthcare consumer payment automation agents
Integrating healthcare claim payments from payers to providers through InstaMed's network for payer operations automation agents
not_for: Non-healthcare payments (InstaMed is healthcare-specific payment network)
International healthcare payments (InstaMed focuses on US healthcare payment ecosystem)
Pharmacy PBM claim processing (InstaMed serves medical claim payments, not specialty pharmacy)
best_when: A healthcare provider, health plan, or healthcare technology company wanting AI agents to process patient payments, collect outstanding balances, handle HSA/FSA payments, and integrate with InstaMed's healthcare payment network backed by JPMorgan Chase.
avoid_when: HIPAA COMPLIANCE MANDATORY: InstaMed processes PHI in healthcare payment context; automated non-HIPAA-compliant implementation creates HIPAA violation; automated must implement HIPAA security rule requirements and execute BAA with InstaMed. HEALTHCARE PROVIDER OR PAYER REQUIRED: InstaMed serves healthcare providers and payers, not general merchants; automated general merchant payment assumption creates wrong product fit; automated must be healthcare provider, health plan, or healthcare technology company. INTEGRATION IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRED: InstaMed integration requires implementation project with healthcare-specific configuration; automated self-service instant API assumption creates implementation_required; automated must plan for implementation. PCI DSS FOR CARD PAYMENTS: Patient card payment processing requires PCI DSS compliance; automated non-PCI implementation creates card data security risk; automated must implement PCI DSS-compliant card handling.

auth.notes: InstaMed uses OAuth2 for healthcare payment API authentication. REST API with JSON. Philadelphia, PA HQ. Founded 2004 by Bill Marvin and Chris Seib. Acquired by JPMorgan Chase in 2019. Products: Patient payments, provider payments, HSA/FSA processing, payment plans, card-on-file, eligibility verification, healthcare financial analytics. SDKs: None public. HIPAA compliant, PCI DSS certified. BAA required. JPMorgan Chase healthcare banking. Competes with Zelis and RevSpring for healthcare payment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Implementation sandbox for contracted providers/payers; production requires InstaMed contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction percentage fees; monthly platform fees; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Philadelphia PA. JPMorgan Chase. Per-transaction. HIPAA, PCI DSS. Healthcare payment network.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth2 client; payment processing APIs optimized for healthcare volume

known_agent_gotchas: BAA REQUIRED BEFORE ANY INTEGRATION: InstaMed handles PHI; HIPAA Business Associate Agreement must be executed before development; automated non-BAA integration creates HIPAA violation exposure; automated must execute BAA and implement HIPAA safeguards

HSA/FSA REQUIRES IIAS MERCHANT CODE: HSA/FSA debit card payments require IIAS (Inventory Information Approval System) merchant categorization for substantiation; automated generic card payment assumption creates HSA/FSA transaction decline; automated must have IIAS-eligible merchant status for HSA/FSA acceptance

PAYMENT PLANS REQUIRE CONSENT DOCUMENTATION: Healthcare payment plans with recurring patient billing require documented patient financial consent; automated plan-without-consent assumption creates patient financial consent gap; automated must capture and store patient payment plan authorization

PROVIDER NPI REQUIRED: Healthcare payment transactions require provider National Provider Identifier (NPI); automated generic merchant ID assumption creates provider_not_found; automated must include correct provider NPI for all healthcare payment transactions

ELIGIBILITY BEFORE PAYMENT: Best practice is to verify patient insurance eligibility before payment collection; automated payment-without-eligibility assumption creates incorrect patient responsibility collection; automated should implement eligibility check for patient responsibility determination
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare payment network. HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOC2, NACHA. OAuth2. US. PHI and patient payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Healthcare payments. HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US. PHI and patient payment data.
